name: OpenContracts
description: Humans and AI agents, building knowledge bases together. Self-hosted document annotation, version control, semantic search, and MCP.
summaryZh: Humans and AI agents, building knowledge bases together. Self-hosted document annotation, version control, semantic search, and MCP. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
